While partnering the world’s leading IT Co’s, DMS specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets DMS provides the excitement of working with the world’s leading IT brands, Financial solutions and learning from experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry. DMS represents the World’s leading American IT Co’s IBM, HP, Oracle, Microsoft, Diebold Nixdorf, Entrust-Datacard, Cisco and VMWare and has been the first to implement many cutting-edge technology solutions in Sri Lanka for over 48 years. The following vacancy currently exists in the Banking and Financial Systems Strategic Business Unit (SBU) of DMS. Vacancy: Software Engineer (Male) Applicants should be under 28 years of age and possess a Computer Science / Software degree from a recognized University / Institute and have a desire to pursue a career in Software Development and Support. Candidates for these positions should have: Working knowledge in C#, .NET Framework, Web Forms, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3 and PostgreSQL. A willingness to learn new things, and have the ability to Understand Programming Logic. Strong ability to reverse engineer code and the ability to read and understand code written by others. A good grasp of OOP design concepts and functional programming concepts. Ability to suggest innovative ideas and find solutions to problems on their own. Have the ability to interpret new SDK references and documentation. Experience in using Linux and Microsoft Windows servers, drivers, their functions etc. If selected for an interview, applicants should be able to Demonstrate All Above Listed Capabilities with Examples from academic & internship or work related projects completed. Job Profile Includes the following: - Customer requirement gathering. Planning, Design and Implementation of software applications, including UI design and writing code according to given specifications. Work closely with function teams to deliver efficient business solutions. Support ongoing SAP S/ 4HANA projrcts and ensure amooth system operations. Troubleshoot and resolve issues to maintain system performance. Requirements - Bachelor's degree in infomation technology, computer sciemce, Software Engineering or an equivalent qualification. 2+ yeras of hands on experince in SAP ABAP development. Strong problem- solving skills, attention to detail, analytical and a collaborative mindset. Exposure to SAPs /HANA database structure, knowledge of SAP functional modules will be an added advantage. Knowledge of Java, Python, PHP, MS AQL and .NET is an advantage. Knowledge of FIORI Apps development is a value addition. Salary - Attractive. Negotiable E mail detailed cv to mileslcv02@gmail.com Please write the position applied for on the subject column and your current & expected salary on the body of the email.
